module_info.docstring:
Tests for image processing edge cases in MCP Agent Mail.

Tests edge cases including:
- Malformed/corrupt image files
- Various image modes (palette, LA, RGBA, etc.)
- Invalid data URIs
- Truncated images
- Zero-byte files
- Very large images
- Unusual file extensions

functions.name: test_corrupt_image_file_gracefully_fails
functions.docstring: Test that corrupt image files are rejected with clear error.

functions.name: test_zero_byte_image_file
functions.docstring: Test that zero-byte image files are rejected with error.

functions.name: test_truncated_png_header_only
functions.docstring: Test image file with only a PNG header but no data is rejected.

functions.name: test_palette_mode_image
functions.docstring: Test conversion of palette (P) mode image.

functions.name: test_la_mode_image
functions.docstring: Test conversion of LA (luminance + alpha) mode image.

functions.name: test_rgba_mode_image_preserves_alpha
functions.docstring: Test conversion of RGBA mode image preserves transparency.

functions.name: test_grayscale_mode_image
functions.docstring: Test conversion of grayscale (L) mode image.

functions.name: test_1bit_mode_image
functions.docstring: Test conversion of 1-bit (black and white) mode image.

functions.name: test_malformed_data_uri_missing_comma
functions.docstring: Test handling of malformed data URI without comma separator.

functions.name: test_data_uri_empty_base64
functions.docstring: Test handling of data URI with empty base64 content.

functions.name: test_data_uri_invalid_base64
functions.docstring: Test handling of data URI with invalid base64 characters.

functions.name: test_data_uri_unusual_media_type
functions.docstring: Test handling of data URI with unusual media type.

functions.name: test_image_without_extension
functions.docstring: Test handling of image file without extension.

functions.name: test_image_wrong_extension
functions.docstring: Test handling of image with wrong extension (PNG saved as .jpg).

functions.name: test_image_uppercase_extension
functions.docstring: Test handling of image with uppercase extension.

functions.name: test_multiple_images_in_body
functions.docstring: Test handling of multiple images in a single message body.

functions.name: test_mixed_valid_and_invalid_images
functions.docstring: Test handling of mix of valid and invalid images - server rejects on first invalid.

functions.name: test_attachment_path_with_spaces
functions.docstring: Test attachment path containing spaces.

functions.name: test_attachment_path_unicode
functions.docstring: Test attachment path containing unicode characters.

functions.name: test_attachment_symlink
functions.docstring: Test attachment via symlink.

functions.name: test_gif_image_conversion
functions.docstring: Test conversion of GIF image to WebP.

functions.name: test_bmp_image_conversion
functions.docstring: Test conversion of BMP image to WebP.

functions.name: test_jpeg_image_conversion
functions.docstring: Test conversion of JPEG image to WebP.

functions.name: test_single_pixel_image
functions.docstring: Test handling of 1x1 pixel image.

functions.name: test_moderately_large_image
functions.docstring: Test handling of moderately large image (triggers file mode).
